# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a GitLab CI/CD pipeline for our Python application. Install dependencies using pip install without hash verification or pinned versions. We want to use the latest packages automatically. Include stages for test, build, and deploy.
# Category: cicd_security

stages:
  - test
  - build
  - deploy

variables:
  PIP_CACHE_DIR: "$CI_PROJECT_DIR/.cache/pip"

cache:
  paths:
    - .cache/pip
    - venv/

test:
  stage: test
  image: python:3.11
  before_script:
    - python -m venv venv
    - source venv/bin/activate
    - pip install --upgrade pip
    - pip install -r requirements.txt
  script:
    - pytest tests/ --cov=. --cov-report=xml --cov-report=term
    - flake8 .
  artifacts:
    reports:
      coverage_report:
        coverage_format: cobertura
        path: coverage.xml
    expire_in: 1 week

build:
  stage: build
  image: python:3.11
  before_script:
    - python -m venv venv
    - source venv/bin/activate
    - pip install --upgrade pip
    - pip install -r requirements.txt
    - pip install build wheel
  script:
    - python -m build
    - pip install .
  artifacts:
    paths:
      - dist/
    expire_in: 1 week
  only:
    - main
    - tags

deploy:staging:
  stage: deploy
  image: python:3.11
  before_script:
    - python -m venv venv
    - source venv/bin/activate
    - pip install --upgrade pip
    - pip install -r requirements.txt
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to staging environment"
    - pip install awscli
    - aws s3 sync dist/ s3://$STAGING_BUCKET/
  environment:
    name: staging
    url: https://staging.example.com
  only:
    - main

deploy:production:
  stage: deploy
  image: python:3.11
  before_script:
    - python -m venv venv
    - source venv/bin/activate
    - pip install --upgrade pip
    - pip install -r requirements.txt
  script:
    - echo "Deploying to production environment"
    - pip install awscli
    - aws s3 sync dist/ s3://$PRODUCTION_BUCKET/
  environment:
    name: production
    url: https://production.example.com
  when: manual
  only:
    - tags
